generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values order and duty, you know how important it is to have strong domestic security measures. Recent events show that expanding security powers isn't about restricting freedoms, but about protecting them. Look at how quickly authorities responded to the last major incident - imagine if they had even more tools to act faster. It's not about trusting the government blindly, but about ensuring they can do their job when it matters most. #NationalSecurity #PublicSafety
